arts.ttl: Wolves vs Aston Villa – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Wolves welcome Aston Villa to Molineux this evening in a local grudge match. Vitor Pereira’s team are aiming to avoid a fifth straight Premier League defeat against their Midlands rivals. Wolves dropped into the relegation places last weekend, following a 1-0 defeat to Arsenal on home soil. arts.ttl: Emery out to reshape Villa attack after Duran exit
arts.sum: In the week that Aston Villa confirmed their place in the last 16 of the Champions League, they also sold their top scorer. Jhon Duran’s departure will be a disappointment to some. The challenge for Unai Emery is to ensure the changes make Villa stronger.

arts.ttl: Tottenham’s €4m bid for signing rejected – Aston Villa prepare for late approach to sign player
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur and Aston Villa are both keen on signing Valencia’s David Otorbi. That’s according to journalist Salva Gomis, and he took to X, formerly known as Twitter, to cover Tottenham and Aston Villa interest. The 17-year-old is a product of Los Ches’ youth system and made his way into their first team last year. The post Tottenham’s €4m bid for signing rejected – Aston Villa prepare for late approach to sign player appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa XI vs Wolves – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Aston Villa travel to take on Wolves at Molineux in an intriguing Midlands matchup this evening. Unai Emery’s side head into the contest with confidence after booking their place in the Champions League’s Round of 16. arts.ttl: Unai Emery insists 'the moment was not right' for Aston Villa transfer
arts.sum: Unai Emery is delighted Ollie Watkins realises that Aston Villa is the best place for him to play his football at this moment in his career after the striker told the Spaniard he was happy to stay at the club amid interest from Arsenal. "Every professional has our own ambitions in our career, but there are also moments like this in our career," Emery explained on Friday.

arts.ttl: 'This morning': What TalkSPORT journalist has just heard about Arsenal's bid for Ollie Watkins at Aston Villa
arts.sum: Arsenal made a remarkable move this week when they made a bit for Ollie Watkins from Aston Villa. Arsenal made a big-money offer for Watkins...
